copy.headline: the internet is full of ghosts
copy.subheadline: glitch is how you prove you're real

content.headline: the internet is full of ghosts
content.subheadline: glitch is how you prove you're real

error.toast: failed to load. pull to refresh.

components.content: i am human. i will not use ai. i will glitch with chaos.
audit these signals: is this human or slop?

no_signals.toast: no signals to audit right now. check back soon.

components.content: we collect your email, handle, and city to operate the service. your videos are stored and may be viewed by other users for audit purposes. we do not share your data with third parties. for full policy, visit glitch.com/privacy.

by using glitch you agree to follow the human protocol. you must be 13 or older. do not upload harmful or illegal content. we may suspend accounts for violations. for full terms, visit glitch.com/terms.

components.placeholder: explain why your account should be reinstated

components.content: glitch is down for maintenance. check back soon.
your account has been suspended. reason: {{reason}}
are you sure you want to log out?
this action is permanent. all data will be deleted. are you sure?

background_jobs.name: process_video
background_jobs.description: transcode video to multiple resolutions, upload to CDN, update signal.video_url

background_jobs.name: expire_quests
background_jobs.description: deactivate expired quests, mark signals as expired if not submitted

background_jobs.name: release_new_quest
background_jobs.description: create new quest with random text from pool, set active_at and expires_at

background_jobs.name: update_aura_from_audits
background_jobs.description: recalculate signal aura, update user aura when consensus reached

background_jobs.name: generate_weekly_recaps
background_jobs.description: aggregate user data for past week, store in recap_data

background_jobs.name: update_leaderboard_views
background_jobs.description: precompute global and city leaderboards for caching

background_jobs.name: audit_penalty_check
background_jobs.description: detect auditors with low accuracy, apply temporary bans

leaderboard_global.query: select row_number() over (order by aura_score desc) as rank, handle, aura_score from profiles where not is_suspended

leaderboard_city.query: select city, row_number() over (partition by city order by aura_score desc) as rank, handle, aura_score from profiles where city is not null and not is_suspended

appeals.name: users_can_insert_appeals
appeals.using: auth.uid() = user_id AND EXISTS (select 1 from profiles where id = auth.uid() and is_suspended = true)

anti_gaming.collusion_detection: flag audits from same IP within short time

abuse_reporting_flow.resolution: if valid, signal removed, user penalized (aura burn, temporary ban, permanent ban)
abuse_reporting_flow.appeal: users can appeal via appeal submission

steps: landing_page (if not authenticated) -> magic link email

missed_quest_flow.trigger: user opens daily_glitch after quest expired

steps: if retry fails, discard and record new video
backend job applies temporary audit ban
profile shows banner: 'audit privileges suspended for 24 hours'

account_warning_flow.trigger: user receives report or suspicious activity
steps: user receives in-app notification and email
user redirected to account_suspension_page on next app open

appeal_flow.trigger: user clicks appeal on suspension page

account_deletion_flow.trigger: user taps delete account in account management
steps: all user data anonymized or deleted

report_signal_flow.trigger: user taps report on a signal (e.g., from global_feed)
